name: UX Audit
description: Systematically evaluates a user interface against established usability heuristics or accessibility standards, producing a scored finding report with remediation recommendations.

evidence.notes: Martin Stepanoski @mastepanoski/claude-skills -- /nielsen-heuristics-audit audits UI against Nielsen 10 usability heuristics step-by-step.
Paul Bakaus /impeccable -- Elite design vocabulary and audit tool with 23 specialized polishing commands.
